findings.issue: KNOWLEDGE-STRUCTURING-SKILL listed twice (lines 7 and 18 in Agent 06 skills library)
findings.suggestion: Remove line 18 duplicate, keep single entry at line 7
findings.est_impact: Prevents Agent 06 from loading conflicting skill definitions

findings.issue: discord-history.jsonl documented as 'last 7 days loaded into context' but no TTL/cleanup mechanism exists in scheduler.js or index.js
findings.suggestion: Add explicit rotation logic to scheduler.js: delete records older than 7 days at 4AM
findings.est_impact: Prevents unbounded memory growth and context pollution over months

findings.issue: Agents 02-05 marked as STUB but listed as production endpoints in line 68 (/agent/research/synthesize etc. only Agent 06 is ACTIVE)
findings.suggestion: Clarify in ENDPOINTS REFERENCE which Agent 06 endpoints are live vs. which require Agent 02-05 implementation
findings.est_impact: Reduces confusion when Conor tests endpoints
